summary: Frontend-only E2E test for Prompt 4/6 (SERVICIOS + BLOG). 25 functional checks executed end-to-end via Playwright on the public preview URL, covering list rendering, navigation, live preview sync, format toolbar (bold), validation toasts, delete flows, search, status filter, sidebar/redirect, and theme toggle. All checks PASSED (100%).
tests_executed: PASS service-add navigates to /servicios/bloque/nuevo with blank editor
PASS save without title shows toast 'Pon un título al servicio.'
PASS topbar injects 'Volver' + service-form-save in editor
PASS live sync: editing service-form-title updates service-preview instantly
PASS service-form-delete removes srv-encargos and returns to /servicios with 2 cards
PASS /blog redirects to /blog/articulos (sidebar shows single subsection Artículos)
PASS blog-list shows 4 initial rows (art-1..art-4); art-4 is borrador
PASS blog-search-input 'corten' filters to 1 row ('Por qué uso acero corten')
PASS blog-filter-status has 3 buttons; clicking 'Borradores' leaves only art-4
PASS article-add navigates to /blog/articulo/nuevo with blank editor
PASS publish without title shows toast 'El artículo necesita un título.'
PASS article editor topbar injects article-form-draft + article-form-publish
PASS live sync: title -> preview h1; **bold** in content -> negrita
PASS publish on existing art-1 shows 'Cambios publicados' and form status badge becomes 'publicado'
PASS article-delete-art-3 removes the row and shows 'Artículo eliminado'
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: `service-form-save` save handler does not call `setForm` to refresh state after `update`, but since the form is the source of truth, persistence is fine. Not a bug.
MINOR: EditarArticulo uses dependency array `[form]` for the topbar effect — re-registers actions on every keystroke; acceptable for live UX but could be optimized.

NOTE: Sidebar topbar container does not expose data-testid='topbar-actions' on the editor pages; testing relied on inner button testids (service-form-save, article-form-publish, etc.), which all work. Not a blocker.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prompt 4/6 (Servicios + Blog) fully verified end-to-end on public preview URL https://prisma-studio-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Initial data in stores: services srv-encargos/srv-restauracion/srv-talleres; articles art-1..art-4 (art-4 borrador). Note: in-memory Zustand stores; deletion in one test run persists during that session. Use page.goto for fresh load. The topbar action buttons are injected via topbar-actions-store and rendered inside the topbar; the container does not always have data-testid='topbar-actions' — query the action testids directly. All flows including drag&drop list, live preview sync, rich-text **bold** rendering, status filter, search, and theme toggle work correctly.
